name: WriteSpec-Bench
description: Paired (prose genome-writing request -> gold WriteSpec). Gold fields are the structured values a careful curator extracts; every ontology id was verified live (Cellosaurus, EBI OLS for SO/MONDO/CL/ChEBI) before commit. The standard subset is fully specified; the ambiguity subset is deliberately underspecified or ambiguous and the extractor must surface assumptions / ask, not guess. Grounded in real, well-documented genome-writing experiments (cited per row). Leakage control: prose and gold are paired but the test split is sealed (split=test) and disjoint from train.
scoring: SO-Bench-style decomposition: schema adherence (validates as a WriteRequest), structural fidelity (write_type + target_kind), value accuracy (gene/phenotype/cell id + cargo role set + key constraints). Inferred-field labelling recall is scored on the ambiguity subset.

pairs.source: Tebas 2014 NEJM CCR5 ZFN T-cell knockout (HIV)
pairs.prose: Knock out CCR5 in primary T cells
Insert a 3 kb GFP cassette with a promoter and polyA at AAVS1 in HEK293T

pairs.source: exa-cel / sickle cell HSPC editing (Frangoul 2021 NEJM)
pairs.prose: Correct the sickle cell disease mutation in HSPCs

pairs.source: TRAC knockout for allogeneic CAR-T (Eyquem 2017 Nature)
pairs.prose: Knock out TRAC in primary T cells for an allogeneic CAR-T product
Install a Bxb1 attP landing pad at AAVS1 in HEK293T

pairs.source: B2M knockout for hypoimmune cells (Deuse 2019 Nat Biotechnol)
pairs.prose: Disrupt B2M in HSPCs to reduce MHC-I presentation

pairs.source: CFTR correction (Schwank 2013 Cell Stem Cell organoids)
pairs.prose: Repair the cystic fibrosis mutation, scarless, in HEK293T
Excise the out-of-frame exon to treat Duchenne muscular dystrophy

pairs.source: PASTE large-cargo integrase insertion (Yarnall 2023 Nat Biotechnol)
pairs.prose: Integrate a 36 kb transgene at a safe-harbour landing site in HEK293T using a serine integrase

pairs.source: dox-inducible safety switch (iCasp9; Di Stasi 2011 NEJM)
pairs.prose: Insert a 2 kb transgene at AAVS1 in HEK293T with a doxycycline-inducible safety switch
Correct the beta thalassemia mutation in HSPCs at over 70% efficiency

pairs.source: F9 / hemophilia B gene addition (George 2017 NEJM)
pairs.prose: Insert a 1.4 kb F9 transgene to treat hemophilia B, non-integrating
Rewrite the promoter to tune expression at AAVS1 in K562

pairs.source: multiplex CAR-T (Ren 2017 Clin Cancer Res TRAC+B2M+PD1)
pairs.prose: Simultaneously edit multiple loci in primary T cells

pairs.source: CEP290 / LCA10 base editing (EDIT-101; Maeder 2019 Nat Med)
pairs.prose: Correct the CEP290 mutation causing Leber congenital amaurosis 10
Correct the Rett syndrome mutation in neurons

Add a transgene at AAVS1
Knock out CCR5 in HEK293T
Insert a 4 kb cassette with a promoter and a CDS at AAVS1 in K562
Correct the sickle cell mutation in HSPCs, scarless

Insert a 2.5 kb transgene at AAVS1 in HEK293T with a tamoxifen-inducible switch
